title: Thai Lee - The SHI Resource Hub
text:
# Meet Our Authors

# Thai Lee

## CEO and President

## Thai Lee has been the CEO and President of SHI International Corp. since 1989. Under her leadership, SHI transformed from a $1 million reseller into a $15 billion global provider of information technology products and solutions with 35 offices around the world. SHI’s growth has been achieved completely organically. Dynamic, scalable, innovative solutions delivered with world-class customer support have made SHI the complete IT solution provider it is today. According to Forbes, SHI is among the largest privately held companies and the largest woman-owned business in the United States. #### Education * Bachelor of Arts, Biology and Economics, Amherst College
* MBA, Harvard Business School
 #### In Addition: * Trustee Emeriti, Amherst College
* Harvard University, Dean of Advisory Board
* Board of Trustees, Memorial Sloan Kettering Cancer Center

June 3, 2020

Today the employees of SHI lend our voices in support of the peaceful protestors of the most recent episodes of inequality, injustice, and human rights violations.
